completions.label: HTTP to HTTPS redirect

documentation.value: Redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS.
Match request URIs and define how to handle them.
Exact URI match — highest priority.
Case-sensitive regex URI match.
Case-insensitive regex URI match.
Prefix match that takes priority over regex.
Define a group of backend servers for load balancing.
IP hash load balancing for session persistence.
Create a variable whose value depends on another variable.
Create variables based on client IP address.
Set the address and port for the server to accept requests on.

completions.label: listen 443 ssl

documentation.value: Listen on HTTPS port with SSL.

completions.insertText:
listen 443 ssl http2;
listen [::]:443 ssl http2;

documentation.value: Listen on a Unix domain socket.

Enable or disable directory listing.
Define custom error pages.
Forward requests to a backend server.

Rewrite the Location and Refresh headers from the backend.

Path to the SSL private key file.

Check file existence in order and use first found.

completions.label: nginx.conf main

documentation.value: Complete top-level nginx.conf template.

completions.label: stream block

documentation.value:
Set a variable from the auth subrequest response header.

```nginx
auth_request_set $auth_user $upstream_http_x_user;
```

Define the cache key.

```nginx
proxy_cache_key $scheme$request_method$host$request_uri;
```

Define conditions to bypass cache.

```nginx
proxy_cache_bypass $http_cache_control $cookie_nocache;
```

Control TLS session ticket resumption.

```nginx
ssl_session_tickets off; # more secure, forces session cache
```

Specify trusted CA certificate file for OCSP stapling verification.

```nginx
ssl_trusted_certificate /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt;
```

Set allowed TLS versions.

```nginx
ssl_protocols TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3;
```

Set allowed cipher suites.

```nginx
ssl_ciphers 'ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:ECDHE-RSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:...';
```

Timeout for reading a response from the proxied server.

```nginx
proxy_read_timeout 60s;
```

Timeout for establishing connection to proxied server.

```nginx
proxy_connect_timeout 30s;
```

Control response buffering.

```nginx
proxy_buffering off; # for SSE/streaming
```

Set HTTP version for proxied requests.

```nginx
proxy_http_version 1.1; # required for keepalive & websocket
```

completions.label: gzip_types

documentation.value:
Specify MIME types to apply gzip compression.

```nginx
gzip_types text/plain text/css application/json application/javascript text/xml;
```

completions.insertText: gzip_types ${1:text/plain text/css application/json application/javascript text/xml application/xml};

documentation.value:
Set minimum response size to trigger gzip.

```nginx
gzip_min_length 256;
```

Tell caches about encoding content negotiation.

```nginx
gzip_vary on;
```

Compression level 1-9 (1=fast/less, 9=slow/more).

```nginx
gzip_comp_level 5; # good balance
```

Define shared memory zone for rate limiting.

```nginx
limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=one:10m rate=10r/s;
```

Apply rate limiting from a defined zone.

```nginx
limit_req zone=one burst=20 nodelay;
```

Set max number of open files per worker process.

```nginx
worker_rlimit_nofile 65535;
```

Enable accepting multiple connections simultaneously.

```nginx
multi_accept on;
```

Define a named log format.

```nginx
log_format main '$remote_addr - $remote_user [$time_local] "$request" '
                '$status $body_bytes_sent "$http_referer" '
                '"$http_user_agent"';
```

completions.label: Django/Python reverse proxy

documentation.value:
Add custom header to response.

```nginx
add_header X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN always;
```

Allow access from IP/CIDR.

```nginx
allow 192.168.1.0/24;
```

Path to htpasswd file.

```nginx
auth_basic_user_file /etc/nginx/.htpasswd;
```

Timeout for reading client request header.

```nginx
client_header_timeout 60s;
```

Set default MIME type for responses.

```nginx
default_type application/octet-stream;
```

Deny access from IP/CIDR.

```nginx
deny all;
```

Events context.

```nginx
events { worker_connections 1024; }
```

Set index file for FastCGI.

```nginx
fastcgi_index index.php;
```

Set FastCGI parameter.

```nginx
fastcgi_param SCRIPT_FILENAME $document_root$fastcgi_script_name;
```

Map client IP to variable.

```nginx
geo $geo { default 0; 10.0.0.0/8 1; }
```

Enable gzip for proxied responses.

```nginx
gzip_proxied any;
```

HTTP context.

```nginx
http { ... }
```

Conditional (use with caution in location).

```nginx
if ($host = old.com) { return 301 https://new.com$request_uri; }
```

Max requests per keepalive connection.

```nginx
keepalive_requests 1000;
```

Limit connections per key.

```nginx
limit_conn addr 10;
```

Define shared memory for conn limiting.

```nginx
limit_conn_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=addr:10m;
```

Location matching block.

```nginx
location /path { ... }
```
Mail proxy context (IMAP/POP3/SMTP).

Map input to output variable.

```nginx
map $uri $new { /old /new; }
```

Cache file descriptors and metadata.

```nginx
open_file_cache max=1000 inactive=20s;
```

Buffer size for first part of proxied response.

```nginx
proxy_buffer_size 4k;
```

Define proxy cache path and settings.

```nginx
proxy_cache_path /var/cache/nginx levels=1:2 keys_zone=cache:10m max_size=1g;
```

Set cache time per status.

```nginx
proxy_cache_valid 200 302 10m;
```
Change domain in Set-Cookie from proxy.
Change path in Set-Cookie from proxy.

Timeout for sending request to proxied server.

```nginx
proxy_send_timeout 60s;
```

Configure DNS resolver.

```nginx
resolver 8.8.8.8 8.8.4.4 valid=300s;
```

Return status code or redirect.

```nginx
return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
```

Virtual server block.

```nginx
server { listen 80; server_name example.com; }
```

Set a variable value.

```nginx
set $var value;
```

Prefer server cipher order.

```nginx
ssl_prefer_server_ciphers on;
```

Configure SSL session cache.

```nginx
ssl_session_cache shared:SSL:10m;
```

Timeout for SSL session reuse.

```nginx
ssl_session_timeout 1d;
```

Enable OCSP stapling.

```nginx
ssl_stapling on;
```

TCP/UDP proxy context.

```nginx
stream { ... }
```

Enable basic status info.

```nginx
stub_status;
```
Replace string in response body.

Enable TCP_NODELAY.

```nginx
tcp_nodelay on;
```

Enable TCP_NOPUSH.

```nginx
tcp_nopush on;
```
Define MIME type mappings.

Define upstream server group.

```nginx
upstream backend { server 127.0.0.1:8080; }
```
